description: Stonebraker-style benchmark run over five retail-backed Eden sources.

methodology.notes: The initial run ships benchmark tasks plus evidence queries. Manual gold answers can be attached once the benchmark is exercised against a live Eden deployment.

auxiliary_corpora.purpose: document-style retrieval experiments without changing the five-source benchmark universe
raw markdown view of the benchmark corpus for filesystem-backed retrieval without changing the five-source benchmark universe

tasks.question: Which brands drive the most marketplace engagement while also carrying premium catalog prices?
Do the top spenders in Postgres match the Redis top-spender leaderboard?
Which high-engagement marketplace brands are also attracting negative review sentiment?
Which brands dominate the catalog and also appear at the top of Redis real-time brand leaderboards?
Which catalog-heavy brands also generate the most purchase revenue in analytics?
Does the Redis top-products leaderboard agree with ClickHouse purchase volume by product?
Which revenue-leading brands are simultaneously accumulating negative review evidence?
Which brands with negative review clusters also have the largest catalog footprint?
Do engagement-heavy brands in marketplace events also win on downstream purchase revenue?
